perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a blue hoodie sits at a table with a small potted plant, while a man in a white tank top stands behind her holding a red foam bat. They are playing a challenge game. (2) The man playfully hits the woman's head with the foam bat when she fails to answer correctly or almost swears. (3) A second woman wearing a black vest and white shirt enters the frame, looking annoyed and questioning their activity. (4) The woman in the blue hoodie holds up a smartphone to the camera, transitioning to a screen-recording view of the Shopee mobile app. (5) Close-up shots show the phone screen browsing various short videos within the app, specifically focusing on a cat video and product links. (6) The woman in the blue hoodie returns to the screen, gesturing enthusiastically while explaining the app's features, with graphics showing a referral code.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music starts. Male and female voices are heard shouting phonetic symbols and attempting to say words starting with them. (2) Sound effects like 'ding' and 'don' (failure sound) are played during the game. (3) A third female voice enters with a stern, questioning tone. (4) The primary female voice shifts to a persuasive, informative tone, explaining the benefits of the Shopee Affiliate Program over the continuous BGM. (5) Occasional sound effects emphasize key points appearing on screen, such as monetary values.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV：不能講髒話' (POV: Cannot swear) - Hook. (2) Decorative Text: Phonetic symbols like 'ㄎㄎ', 'ㄅㄑ', 'ㄍㄋㄋ' appear as part of the game challenge. (3) Functional Text: '拍那麼多短影片 除了流量還可以幹嘛' (What else can you do with so many short videos besides traffic?). (4) Hook Text: '蝦皮分潤計畫' (Shopee Affiliate Program). (5) Hook Text: '15%以上的分潤金' (Over 15% commission). (6) Functional Text: 'JEBAA4E' - Referral code.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Game Hook -> Confrontation -> App Demonstration -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male in white tank top, 1 female in blue hoodie (main), 1 female in black vest.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair tied in buns, wearing a blue hooded sweatshirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor space featuring white cabinets filled with collectible toys like Be@rbrick and Crayon Shin-chan figurines. A wooden table is in the foreground.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote the Shopee Affiliate Program by first engaging viewers with a humorous 'no-swearing' challenge and then demonstrating how creators can monetize their short videos through commissions and referral codes.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of the Shopee app, explanation of the 15% commission benefit, and the provision of a personal referral code.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of Taiwanese phonetic symbols for a language game; high-energy interaction between the hosts.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes popular short-video editing tropes like fast cuts, bright captions, and exaggerated sound effects to maintain viewer retention for a promotional message.
